name: Gefen: Optimized Stochastic Optimizer

description: arXiv:2606.13894v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: AdamW is a default optimizer for modern deep learning, but its first and second moment states add roughly two parameter-sized buffers to training memory, increasing the already substantial cost of large-scale pretraining. We propose Gefen, a memory-efficient optimizer that automatically shares second-moment estimates across parameter blo...
author: Nadav Benedek, Tomer Koren, Ohad Fried
